name: openrouterdesk
description: Security-first open-source Windows desktop manager for supported routers, beginning with ZTE F6600P.
author: OpenRouterDesk contributors

scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5173 file:dist-electron/main/index.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron .
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.dist:store: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.store.yml --win appx
